word: G1699 - ἐμός - emós - em-os' - Of me

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐμός

- Transliteration: Emos

- Phonetic: em-os'

- Definition:

1. my, mine, etc.

- Origin: from the oblique cases of G1473 (G1698, G1700, G1691)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: From the oblique cases of G1473 (G1698 G1700 G1691); my: - of me mine (own) my.
